summary: Iteration 31 - Super Admin Overhaul Testing Complete. All backend APIs pass (19/19). Frontend issues fixed: TabHeader hoisting bug in AdminResolvePage.jsx, API limit validation errors (100/200 -> 50) in AdminTemplatesTab.jsx and AdminContestsTab.jsx. All new features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: TabHeader component was used before definition in AdminResolvePage.jsx (hoisting issue)
Fixed: API limit parameters exceeded backend validation (100/200 -> 50) in AdminTemplatesTab.jsx and AdminContestsTab.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Super Admin overhaul features verified: 1) Bulk delete for Questions/Templates/Contests working, 2) Default Templates section (1/5) with gold UI working, 3) AI Override tab with AI preview and edit capability working, 4) Template type badges (FULL MATCH/IN-MATCH) on contest cards working, 5) Manual contest creation inside match view working. Backend limit validation is 50 max for pagination.

features_verified.ai_preview: GET /api/admin/contests/{id}/ai-preview - Working (11 questions with AI predictions)
features_verified.questions_tab_multiselect: Working - checkboxes, bulk delete, search, pagination
features_verified.templates_tab_defaults: Working - Default Templates section with gold UI, template type badges
features_verified.contests_tab_badges: Working - FULL MATCH/IN-MATCH badges, in-match creation
features_verified.ai_override_page: Working - AI answers display with edit capability, submit buttons
